title: Chat bubble blocking reply button
excerpt: Hi, I’m having issues with the chat bubble being in my way when I reply to a message, and I can’t move it out of the way, or close it out completely. Any update to this feature would be appreciated. Thank you. Please see…

posts.author: ElizabethG (Elizabeth Garcia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I’m having issues with the chat bubble being in my way when I reply to a message, and I can’t move it out of the way, or close it out completely. Any update to this feature would be appreciated. Thank you. Please see screenshot below.
